step_name: Match Assets to Site Plan Drawing Symbols
step_description: Using the asset records from Step 7, the text annotations extracted from the site plan in Step 5 (sub-step-extract-all-notes), and the drawing legend from Step 6, locate each asset in the site plan drawing text and identify which legend symbol is associated with it. For each asset record: (1) Strip all leading alphabetic prefix characters and any leading zeros from the asset_id to produce a bare numeric ID (e.g. SLGT00302876 → 302876, CB00045 → 45, TX0001234 → 1234). (2) Search the Step 5 extracted site plan text for the bare numeric ID as a text token or label — asset IDs appear as numeric labels adjacent to their drawing symbols in the annotated text. (3) When found, examine the text context immediately surrounding the bare ID to infer which drawing symbol is associated with it, then match that context to the best-fitting legend entry from Step 6 (comparing symbol descriptions and labels). Set symbol_description and label from the matched legend entry and match_status to 'found'. (4) If the bare ID is not found in the extracted text, set symbol_description and label to null and match_status to 'not_found'. Output an updated_assets array containing every original asset record from Step 7 with four new fields added: bare_id, symbol_description, label, and match_status. Also output asset_symbol_matches (the raw per-asset match results) and match_summary totals.
